citations.title: Association Between the c.34C > T (rs17602729) Polymorphism of the AMPD1 Gene and the Status of Endurance and Power Athletes: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
Importance of selected genetic determinants on endurance performance and physical strength: a narrative review.

snippets.text:
Background

Previous research has shown that variants in the AMPD1 gene, which encodes the adenosine monophosphate deaminase 1 (AMPD1) protein, may affect energy supply of the muscle and fatigue resistance during high-intensity exercise.

citation.title: Association Between the c.34C > T (rs17602729) Polymorphism of the AMPD1 Gene and the Status of Endurance and Power Athletes: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.

snippets.text: A single nucleotide substitution in this gene, specifically a cytosine-to-thymine substitution (c.34C > T; rs17602729), results in a nonsense mutation that causes a deficiency in the AMPD1 protein.

citation.title: Association Between the c.34C > T (rs17602729) Polymorphism of the AMPD1 Gene and the Status of Endurance and Power Athletes: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.

snippets.text: Physical strength and endurance of an individual are vital for athletic performance, and minimizing the risk of injuries, especially during competitions.

citation.title: Importance of selected genetic determinants on endurance performance and physical strength: a narrative review.

snippets.text: Other than training and diet, athletic performance is determined by genetic factors or heredity, which is less focused in sports science research.

citation.title: Importance of selected genetic determinants on endurance performance and physical strength: a narrative review.
